title: /pay <handle> <amount> [chain] — create payer session, send Request
description: Parse '/pay <handle> <amount> [zcash|monero|mobilecoin]' in the chat command loop (default chain: zcash). Validate: handle must be in contacts or online directory, amount must parse as a non-zero decimal. Create a PaymentSession with role=Payer, state=Requested. Send ClearMessage::Payment { session_id, action: PaymentAction::Request { chain, amount } } as a Broadcast. Echo '[payment] Request sent to <handle> — session <short_id>. Waiting for address.' to the local terminal.
